units.name: Fiber & Core Infrastructure Unit
units.description: Handles entire building network blackouts, damaged fiber optic cables, structural switch failures, and core backbone links.

units.name: Helpdesk & LAN Routing Unit
units.description: Handles office LAN port faults, wall jack replacements, single system IP configuration conflicts, and localized Wi-Fi router issues.

units.name: Network Operations Center (NOC)
units.description: Handles institutional email access locks, departmental sub-domain setups, firewall white-listing, and server access exceptions.

tickets.title: Office LAN Port Fault in Faculty of Arts
tickets.description: The LAN wall outlet in Room 204 has been completely dead since yesterday. We have tried multiple network patch cables and systems, but there is no link light on the switch side. This is halting administrative tasks.

tickets.title: Wi-Fi Router IP Conflict in Department of Chemistry
tickets.description: Users connecting to UI-CHEM-WIFI are getting IP conflict errors. The local router seems to be conflict-assigning IPs that overlap with the departmental static IP pool. Needs DHCP lease pool reset or router reconfiguration.

tickets.title: Broken Wall Jack Replacement in Faculty of Education
tickets.description: Physical damage to the network socket. The plastic clip-in interface is broken, causing the Ethernet cable to fall out continuously. We need a replacement RJ45 faceplate installed.

tickets.title: Core Fiber Break near Trenchard Hall
tickets.description: Exhaustive backbone link drop. The connection between Trenchard Hall switch and ICT core switch room went down during construction works. Physical link down detected.

tickets.title: Faculty of Technology Lab Wi-Fi IP Conflict
tickets.description: DHCP server is not assigning IP addresses to student devices. We need to clear static IP conflicts on local APs.
